cards.front: What resources does an operating system manage?
cards.back: Peripherals, processes, memory and backing store.

cards.front: Why does an operating system provide a user interface?
cards.back: So users can interact with the computer system.
Software that performs maintenance tasks such as backup, antivirus or compression.

cards.front: Give one example of utility software.
cards.back: Backup tools, antivirus tools, compression tools or disk utilities.
Secondary storage used to keep data and programs long term.
